description: Manufactures, sells, and maintains semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Main products include batch film deposition equipment for NAND and DRAM, treatment equipment for film quality improvement, and cleaning equipment.

_externalRelationships.notes: 70% market share in batch ALD, 34% in batch CVD. TSMC is #2 customer. Serves all major 3D NAND makers.

_metadata.notes: Q2 2025 revenue: 65.42B JPY (+33% YoY). 2024 revenue: 238.93B JPY (+32% YoY). CEO projects 20% NAND equipment demand growth, 15% DRAM growth.
